column2:
```r
topcyt<-dncyt |> arrange(-Dn) |> head(10) |> pull(name)

weighted_rew<-dncyt |> arrange(-Dn) |> head(10) |> ggplot(aes(x=fct_relevel(name, rev(topcyt)),y=Dn))+
  geom_point(aes(size=degree, fill = Dn), shape = 21)+
  scale_fill_gradient(low = 'grey90', high='darkred')+
  scale_size_continuous(range=c(3,9))+
  coord_flip()+
  ylab('Weighted rewiring score')+xlab('Cytokine')+ theme_hc(base_size = 22)+theme(legend.position = 'right')
weighted_rew
ggsave(weighted_rew, file='../figures/weighted_rewiring.png', width = 14, height = 10, dpi =300)
```
